sourcesContent:
export default function CartDrawer({ cart, onClose }) { // Calculate totals const itemsTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price, 0); const originalTotal = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.originalPrice, 0); const savings = originalTotal - itemsTotal; const deliveryCharge = 0; // Free for now const handlingCharge = 2; const grandTotal = itemsTotal + handlingCharge + deliveryCharge; return (
My Cart Share
Your total savings ₹{savings}
⏱️ Delivery in 11 minutes
Shipment of {cart.length} item{cart.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
{cart.map((item, idx) => (
{item.name}
{item.volume}
₹{item.price}
{/* Quantity controls can be added here */} 1
))}
Bill details
Items total Saved ₹{savings} ₹{originalTotal} ₹{itemsTotal}
Delivery charge FREE
Handling charge ₹{handlingCharge}
Grand total ₹{grandTotal}
Your total savings ₹{savings}
Cancellation Policy
Orders cannot be cancelled once packed for delivery. In case of unexpected delays, a refund will be provided, if applicable.
); }
